The place is good, comfortable and clean, the attention of the guys and the breakfast very good 👍

reviews.comment:
Fila de más de 10 autos. Después de más de 20 min esperando, nos dice el playero que su turno termino y cuando llegue su compañero seguirán. Autos en fila, playeros dando vuelta sin atender. El compañero apareció y se metió en el baño más de 15 minutos. Impresentable

(Translated by Google)
A line of more than 10 cars. After waiting for over 20 minutes, the attendant told us his shift was over and that service would resume when his colleague arrived. Cars lined up, attendants wandering around idly. The colleague finally showed up and went into the bathroom for over 15 minutes. Unacceptable.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCcjdqQVhBEAE

reviews.comment:
Desesperante la lentitud de los playeros. Luego el problema de las caídas de sistema de Red de YPF y la falta de combustible, lógica por razones de ubicación geográfica

(Translated by Google)
The slowness of the beach workers is frustrating. Then there's the problem of YPF's network system outages and the lack of fuel, which is logical due to geographic location.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCejlUMTF3RRAB

reviews.comment:
El shop no tiene cortinas, desayunas con el sol que te parte la cara. No tienen o no prenden el aire, salís pasado de calor y transpirado. Variedad de productos muy limitada. Muy mejorable.

(Translated by Google)
The shop has no curtains; you have breakfast with the sun beating down on your face. They either don't have air conditioning or they don't turn it on, so you leave overheated and sweaty. The product selection is very limited. It could be much better.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCNS11bGdnRRAB
